title: Reassemble filters on the server side
body:
--filter label=foo=bar, was been translated on the server side to
--filter label=foo --filter=bar

This PR fixes this back to what the user specified.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

@edsantiago I am always charged, although my wife is yelling at me now, so I am heading to the beach. :^) And you should not be here either.

> @edsantiago I am always charged, although my wife is yelling at me now, so I am heading to the beach. :^) And you should not be here either.

She was right to do so ;-) Hope you enjoyed surfing.

LGTM. Given an image with `LABEL version="1.0"`:
```console
$ ./bin/podman-remote --url $MYSOCK images -f label=foo=bar
REPOSITORY  TAG     IMAGE ID  CREATED  SIZE
$ ./bin/podman-remote --url $MYSOCK images -f label=version=1..
REPOSITORY  TAG     IMAGE ID  CREATED  SIZE
$ ./bin/podman-remote --url $MYSOCK images -f label=version=1.0
REPOSITORY      TAG     IMAGE ID      CREATED         SIZE
localhost/test  latest  c46c4c460591  34 seconds ago  5.85 MB
```

/lgtm
